metadata.description: Open source Agent Skills from The AIE Network for Claude Code and Cowork — practical, source-backed tools for people doing real work with AI. Writing, web, and social bundles.

plugins.name: ai-slop-killer
plugins.description: The final anti-AI-slop editing pass for any prose. Detects documented AI writing tells, scores the passage, rewrites in place, and proves what it caught. Configurable per house style.

plugins.name: aie-web
plugins.description: Nine focused web skills — SEO/AEO audit, site health audit, performance, pre-launch QA, defensive security review, link checking, form wiring, UX review, and automated Playwright testing. Stack-agnostic.

plugins.name: aie-social
plugins.description: Research-driven social post generators for LinkedIn and X. Real research phase with cited sources, proven hooks and platform-tuned formatting, a quality rubric, and a final ai-slop-killer pass.

plugins.name: aie-chief-of-staff
plugins.description: Your morning chief of staff. One prioritized daily brief from your calendar, inbox (read-only triage), and a scan of your industry news + tracked competitors. Read-only and safe by default; configurable per industry via cos.config.md.

plugins.name: aie-skill-creator
plugins.description: Build a new, high-quality Claude Agent Skill from scratch — frontmatter, tight SKILL.md, progressive-disclosure reference files, a self-test, and packaging as a .skill or plugin. Also audits and improves existing skills and fixes descriptions that don't trigger.
